name: Placeholder Hero
subtitle: until the hand is authored

ultimate_ability.label: Hold the Room
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Whatever the room is doing, it stops doing it for a turn. The pressure track does not advance; the gravity deck does not draw; arrivals delay one beat. The room is still there when you let go.

notes: Universal fallback hand. Engine routes here when the host names a hand_id whose JSON hasn't been authored yet (frank, natalie, evangeline, ensemble, tbd_*). Replace by writing a real hand file at the host's hand_id name.
